title: Risk Assurance Associate
description: Executed ITGC and ITAC audits across SAP and non-SAP financial systems spanning banking, retail, energy, and telecoms — covering access management, change management, computer operations, and program development.

Managed 6–7 concurrent client audits during peak season — performing process walkthroughs, evidence review, and IT control assessments, and reporting control gaps and remediation plans to C-level stakeholders during exit meetings.

Advised clients — including a local government entity — on improving and formalizing IT control environments as part of ICFR implementation, mapping controls into Business Process Models (BPM) and Risk & Control Matrices (RCM).
Supported clients in ensuring controls operate effectively as defined — conducting re-performance testing and evidence validation to confirm operating effectiveness post-implementation.
Applied CAATs using Alteryx to extract, validate, and analyze datasets with 100K+ records, reducing manual testing effort by ~20–30% through structured filtering and anomaly identification.

Contributed to a PySpark pipeline on Cloudera/Hive for a banking analytics engagement — preprocessing 1M+ monthly transaction records across 5,000+ branches, with unit tests covering core pipeline components, to support ML-driven branch trend analysis.
Leading internal adoption of audit analytics tooling — training colleagues on Alteryx and data analytics workflows, and building automation that replaced manual team utilization reporting.
Built Alteryx workflows to automate team utilization reporting, enabling more efficient revenue tracking and reducing manual operational effort.

title: Information System Laboratory Assistant
company: ITB Information System Laboratory - Bandung, Indonesia
description: Mentored student projects in system analysis, enterprise architecture, UX/UI, SDLC, and project management.
Guided project milestones and provided structured feedback.

title: IoT Product Researcher Intern
description: Conducted process mapping, requirement analysis, benchmarking, and user research to define features, user flows, and subscription concepts for an IoT energy monitoring platform.
Evaluated product-market fit using surveys and trend analysis in the manufacturing energy monitoring space.

title: IT Platform Operation Intern
description: Developed Python (Pandas) log-processing scripts for operational monitoring and integrated Telegram Bot API with Grafana alerts, improving incident response by ~30%.
Supported IT data governance, audit coordination, and operational documentation.

title: My Digital Academy Awardee
description: Selected participant in Bank Mandiri's fintech product development program.
Designed a financial literacy prototype (BudgetBuddies) for teenagers — applying product principles including user segmentation, wireframing, and MVP definition.

title: Cloud Computing Cohort
description: Developed skills in cloud computing, networking, system administration, and web programming.
Built and deployed cloud-native applications using Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Earned Google Cloud Skill Badges.
Contributed to the Promosee capstone project integrating cloud infrastructure with ML model serving.
